title: Everything You Desire
description: Everything You Desire is a Modpack which is trying to provide as much diversity as somehow possible for you and your friends.
body:
---

Issues • Installation • Wiki  

---

Everything You Desire is a Modpack which is trying to provide as much diversity as somehow possible for you and your friends.

Mods like Adorn, Furnish, Rechiseled, Deep and Darker and many new Structures will improve your building possibilities and your adventures, alone or with friends.
This Modpack offers depth by having heavy tech mods such as Ad Astra, Create, CC: Tweaked and Modern Industrialization.
It even has Magic Mods like Bewitchment.

Everything You Desire guarantees you to have a completly new Minecraft experience, a better one!

--- Please contact me if you're a creator of a mod and want it to be removed.

---
